entry.title: ABot-World-0: Infinite Interactive World Rollout on a Single Desktop GPU
entry.summary: We present ABot-World-0, an action-conditioned video world model for real-time, long-horizon closed-loop interaction, supported by a multi-source data infrastructure spanning AAA games, simulation eng... \u00b7 Upvotes: 200 \u00b7 GitHub Stars: 884 \u00b7 Authors: Fan Jiang, Zhaoxu Sun, Mengchao Wang

entry.title: RynnBrain 1.1: Towards More Capable and Generalizable Embodied Foundation Model
entry.summary: We present RynnBrain 1.1, a family of embodied foundation models spanning 2B, 9B, and 122B-A10B scales. Trained with a unified spatio-temporal and physically grounded framework, RynnBrain 1.1 supports... \u00b7 Upvotes: 191 \u00b7 Authors: Kehan Li, Bohan Hou, Minghao Zhu

entry.title: LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget
entry.summary: A growing gap separates inference context lengths from RL post-training: inference systems are approaching million-token contexts, while post-training workloads often remain at 256K tokens or below an... \u00b7 Upvotes: 195 \u00b7 GitHub Stars: 31 \u00b7 Authors: Changhai Zhou, Kieran Liu, Yuhua Zhou

entry.title: Harness Handbook: Making Evolving Agent Harnesses Readable,Navigable, and Editable
entry.summary: The capability of a modern AI agent depends not only on its foundation model but also on its harness, which constructs prompts, manages state, invokes tools, and coordinates execution. As models, APIs... \u00b7 Upvotes: 216 \u00b7 GitHub Stars: 117 \u00b7 Authors: Ruhan Wang, Yucheng Shi, Zongxia Li

entry.title: PalmClaw: A Native On-Device Agent Framework for Mobile Phones
entry.summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents have moved beyond generating responses to executing multi-step tasks by calling tools, observing the results, and iteratively deciding the next action. Most agent sys... \u00b7 Upvotes: 14 \u00b7 GitHub Stars: 1133 \u00b7 Authors: Hongru Cai, Yongqi Li, Ran Wei

entry.title: Infinite Worlds with Versatile Interactions
entry.summary: We present LingBot-World 2.0 (also known as LingBot-World-Infinity), an advanced iteration of LingBot-World featuring four distinct upgrades. entry.title: ResearchStudio-Idea: An Evidence-Grounded Research-Ideation Skill Suite from ML Conference Outcomes
entry.summary: Large language models have made research ideation increasingly accessible, yet effective idea development requires more than generating candidate directions. Researchers must ground a problem in curre... \u00b7 Upvotes: 60 \u00b7 GitHub Stars: 1731 \u00b7 Authors: Qihao Zhao, Yangyu Huang, Yalun Dai

entry.title: Securing the AI Agent: A Unified Framework for Multi-Layer Agent Red Teaming

entry.title: Orca: The World is in Your Mind
entry.summary: We introduce Orca, an initial instantiation of a general world foundation model. Orca learns a unified world latent space from multimodal world signals and exposes it through multimodal readout interf... \u00b7 Upvotes: 332 \u00b7 GitHub Stars: 472 \u00b7 Authors: Yihao Wang, Yuheng Ji, Mingyu Cao

entry.title: The Mirage of Optimizing Training Policies: Monotonic Inference Policies as the Real Objective for LLM Reinforcement Learning

entry.title: Unlimited OCR Works
entry.summary: Recently, end-to-end OCR models, exemplified by DeepSeek OCR, have once again thrust OCR into the spotlight.
